banner.title: Get 20% Off Your First Order
banner.subtitle:
Join the Mamarie family and dress your little ones
in premium style with our welcome discount.

card1.title: Born from a mother's love
card1.description: MaMarie was born from the love story of a mother and her little Mari. Every collection carries that warmth and care.

card2.title: For a colorful childhood
card2.description: We believe childhood should be bright, joyful, and full of beautiful memories. Our colors and designs are created to build exactly that world.

card3.title: Comfort without limits
card3.description: Children should move freely, play, dream, and discover the world. That is why our clothes are made first and foremost for their comfort.

card4.title: Confidence
card4.description: When a child grows up in love, care, and a beautiful environment, they walk more confidently toward their future. We believe every little one deserves that kind of childhood.

aboutUs.shortText: is created in Armenia with love and great attention to detail.
aboutUs.longText: is designed for little ones to bring everyday comfort and warmth. The brand combines delicate design with high-quality materials, making every piece soft and pleasant to wear.
